name: Fabled Andwraith
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>轟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>アンドレイス
desc:
1 "Fabled" Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
If this card is Special Summoned: Your opponent can discard 1 card to negate this effect, otherwise you can draw 2 cards, then discard 1 card. If a monster(s) is sent from your opponent's hand to the GY (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of those monsters; Special Summon it to your field, but negate its effects. You can only use each effect of "Fabled Andwraith" once per turn.
mnst_eff:

You can only use each effect of "Fabled Andwraith" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Requires archetype specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Does not require specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard to your field
